files.notes: This file contains two distinct sections: 'Notes from the Field' by Amy Brown Lyman (which includes reports from various stakes and missions) and 'Guide Lessons for April' (which begins with Lesson I on Theology and Testimony). The Guide Lessons section appears to be cut off mid-sentence at the end of the file.

files.notes: This file contains four distinct lesson sections for April, each with different subject areas: Theology/Testimony, Work/Business, Literature, and Social Service. Each lesson has its own questions and problems section at the end. The file ends with advertisements that should be included with the final lesson.
